---
title: "PLFS Labour Market Pipeline — data.table + survey"
description: "Fully reproducible R pipeline for Periodic Labour Force Survey microdata. Weighted LFPR, WPR, and unemployment estimates by state, gender, and sector 2018–2024."
author: "Pawan Jangra"
date: "2025-03-15"
categories: [Labour, PLFS, data.table, ggiraph]
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1454165804606-c3d57bc86b40?w=600&q=80"
---

Full analysis in [Data Visualizations](../data_vizs.html).

**Tools used:** R, data.table, survey, ggiraph, ggplot2, Quarto

**Data source:** PLFS annual rounds 2017–18 to 2023–24, MOSPI
